case_title: SEDAN OPERATORS COOP.,INC.DBA DESOTO CAB CO. VS TUCKER, JOHN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEDAN OPERATORS COOP.,INC.DBA DESOTO CAB CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUCKER, JOHN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $66.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,066.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-26-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-17-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
